scripts.build:idiomas: npm run update-version && vite build --mode idiomas
scripts.build:general: npm run update-version && vite build --mode general
scripts.cap:sync: npx cap sync && node scripts/sync-android-capacitor-config.cjs && node scripts/sync-android-assets.cjs
scripts.android:sync: npx cap sync android && node scripts/sync-android-capacitor-config.cjs && node scripts/sync-android-assets.cjs
scripts.android:assemble:idiomas: npm run build:idiomas && npm run android:firebase:idiomas && npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd ..
scripts.android:assemble:general: npm run build:general && npm run android:firebase:general && npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd ..
scripts.android:debug:idiomas: npm run android:assemble:idiomas && npm run android:copy-apk
scripts.android:debug:general: npm run android:assemble:general && npm run android:copy-apk
scripts.android:debug-install: npm run android:debug && npm run android:install
scripts.android:run: npm run android:debug && npm run android:emu:wait && npm run android:launch
scripts.android:release:idiomas: npm run build:idiomas && npm run android:version && npm run android:google-oauth:check:idiomas && npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease bundleRelease && cd .. && npm run android:copy-release
scripts.android:release:general: npm run build:general && npm run android:version && npm run android:google-oauth:check:general && npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease bundleRelease && cd .. && npm run android:copy-release
scripts.git-push: git add . && git commit -m "Update" && git push
scripts.guard:wrangler:idiomas: node scripts/check-deploy-auth.cjs wrangler idiomas --config wrangler.idiomas.toml --cwd workers/notifications-relay
scripts.guard:wrangler:general: node scripts/check-deploy-auth.cjs wrangler general --config wrangler.general.toml --cwd workers/notifications-relay
scripts.deploy:rules:idiomas: npm run guard:firebase:idiomas && firebase deploy --project idiomas --only firestore:rules
scripts.deploy:rules:general: npm run guard:firebase:general && firebase deploy --project general --only firestore:rules
scripts.deploy:all:idiomas: npm run guard:firebase:idiomas && npm run build:idiomas && npm run android:version && npm run android:firebase:idiomas && npm run android:sync && npm run live-update:bundle && firebase deploy --project idiomas
scripts.deploy:all:general: npm run guard:firebase:general && npm run build:general && npm run android:version && npm run android:firebase:general && npm run android:sync && npm run live-update:bundle && firebase deploy --project general
scripts.deploy:idiomas: npm run guard:firebase:idiomas && npm run build:idiomas && npm run live-update:bundle && firebase deploy --project idiomas
scripts.deploy:general: npm run guard:firebase:general && npm run build:general && npm run live-update:bundle && firebase deploy --project general
